+        def _finalize(items: Any, *, dedupe: bool) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:

+            seen_keys = set()

+                    continue
+                seen_keys.add(candidate_key)
+                finalized.append(candidate)
+                if len(finalized) >= max_questions:
+                    break
+            return finalized
